name: Log
notes: General system error/event log. Written by ISystemLogger.InsertLog(). Read by admin log viewer.

name: LogEntry
notes: In-memory variant of Log used in some query contexts. Same fields as Log plus LogType enum. Not a DB table.

name: RequestLog
notes: Full HTTP request/response capture. Only written when RequestLogLevel AppSetting > 0. Used for debugging and support.

name: OutgoingRequestLog
notes: Outbound HTTP call log. Written by OutgoingHttpClientLoggingHandler (DelegatingHandler injected into all external HttpClient instances). Used for compliance and debugging.

name: NorwegianOutgoingRequestLog
notes: Specialized log for Norwegian KRR/KoFuVi API calls. Used for billing compliance (per-request Norwegian API quota tracking).

name: MapRequestLog
notes: Tracks map tile render requests per profile. Used for map API billing/quota. Written by MapRequestLogger.

name: ImpersonationLog
notes: Audit record written when a SuperAdmin starts impersonating another user.

methods: InsertLog(logLevel, shortMessage, fullMessage, user, module, dataObject) → int
GetAllLogsAsync(fromUtc, toUtc, message, logLevel, pageIndex, pageSize) → IPagedList<Log>
name: ISystemLogger
DefaultLogger
notes: Primary logger implementation. Truncates ShortMessage to 1500 chars. Also serializes dataObject to JSON.

name: ApplicationInsightsLogger
notes: Forwards all log events to Azure Application Insights via TelemetryClient.

name: FinalEmailLogger
notes: On Fatal-level events: sends email notification to configured admin address via IEmailService.

name: IMailLogger
notes: Sends email on critical log entries. Used by FinalEmailLogger.

name: RequestResponseLoggingMiddleware
trigger: Every HTTP request when RequestLogLevel AppSetting != off
notes: Captures full request path, method, query, payload, response body, status code, ticks (duration). Controlled by AppSetting RequestLogLevel(160): 'All', 'Error', or off.

name: OutgoingHttpClientLoggingHandler
notes: Injected into all registered HttpClient instances. Intercepts outbound HTTP calls, writes OutgoingRequestLog rows.

name: FullLoggingApplicationSettingsService
notes: Decorates IApplicationSettingService. Logs every AppSetting read to system log when FullLogging is enabled. Used for debugging settings access.
